Re-everything Everything deserves to be reflected, reimagined, reinvented, reinterpreted, reviewed, revised, rethink-ed, reconnected, resonated, revolutionized, remixed, revealed, reframed, or rekindled.
& Some things never to be repeated.

Films Series
Archive

My Favorite Series

Here is a list of movies I really enjoyed. The slashes (/) indicate the depth of my enjoyment or its meanifulness to my life.

Disclaimer: This list was built starting from 2013, so many entries are quite outdated or reflect a more immature perspective. Evolving tastes, so to speak.

Action, Adventure, Thriller

  • A Brother's Sun
  • A Man on the Inside
  • Alice in Borderland (Japanese)
  • House of Ninjas (Japanese)
  • How to Get Away with Murder
  • Last Samurai Standing (Japanese)
  • MobLand
  • Paradise /
  • Peaky Blinders //
  • The Days of the Jackal
  • Those About to Die
  • 아이리스 시리즈
  • 나쁜남자
  • 나인 퍼즐
  • 상어 / shark
  • 시티 헌터
  • 오징어 게임
  • 용팔이
  • 추노
  • 미스터 선샤인 //
  • 메이드 인 코리아 /
  • 레이디 두아

Family, Comedy

  • Friends ///
  • New Girl
  • That 70s Show
  • The Big Bang Theory / (s7-6 The Romance Resonance song by howard)
  • The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air

Drama/Romance, Rom-Com/Dramedy

  • Bridgerton
  • Fight Night: The Million Dollar Heist
  • Grey's Anatomy (season 1-7, 3-4)
  • Queen's Gambit
  • The Affair
  • The White Lotus
  • Trillion Game
  • 개인의 취향
  • 그겨울 바람이분다
  • 그해 우리는
  • 나의 아저씨 ///
  • 마이 프린세스
  • 몬스타
  • 밥잘사주는얘쁜누나
  • 사랑비
  • 신사의 품격
  • 우리가 사랑한 시간
  • 자명고
  • 장난스러운 키스
  • 착한남자
  • 하이드 지킬, 나
  • 함부로 애틋하게
